description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a golden-brown, slightly glossy crust. The surface features a prominent, deep score running across the top, which has opened up during baking to reveal a lighter, textured interior. The crust appears thick and firm, with subtle variations in color from light tan to deeper brown, indicating a well-baked exterior. The loaf is unsliced and has a domed, slightly irregular shape, typical of artisanal or country-style bread. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface. The overall appearance suggests a hearty, hand-crafted bread suitable for urban bakeries or street markets.
description: A round, golden-brown rustic loaf with a deep top score and a glossy, thick crust. The bread is unsliced and has a domed, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep, central score and the rounded, domed shape of the loaf.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved profile and the way the score opens up along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unscored back of the loaf with a consistent golden-brown crust.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the closed end of the score and the rounded, slightly irregular base.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a single, deep score across the top, creating a split that exposes the lighter interior. The surface is smooth and glossy with subtle color variations, and there are no seeds, flour dusting, or additional markings.
